contacts.name: initial_zoom_webinar_attendance_average_duration
contacts.label: Total attendance duration percentage before Attendance API migration
contacts.description: This property represent contact property value 'zoom_webinar_attendance_average_duration' before migration to Attendance API

contacts.name: preferred_communication_channel
contacts.label: Preferred communication channel
contacts.description: Tracks the preferred communication channel of a contact for better engagement.

contacts.name: salesforce_product_interest
contacts.label: Salesforce product interest
contacts.description: Identifies the Salesforce products a contact is interested in, aiding targeted sales efforts.

contacts.name: zoom_webinar_attendance_average_duration
contacts.label: Average Zoom webinar attendance duration
contacts.description: The average amount of time this contact attends your Zoom webinars. 100% would mean the contact stays until the end of each Zoom webinar they attend.

contacts.name: zoom_webinar_attendance_count
contacts.label: Total number of Zoom webinars attended
contacts.description: Total number of Zoom webinars this contact has attended.

contacts.name: zoom_webinar_joinlink
contacts.label: Last registered Zoom webinar
contacts.description: The name of the last Zoom webinar this contact registered for. This property is updated every time they register for a new Zoom webinar.

contacts.name: zoom_webinar_registration_count
contacts.label: Total number of Zoom webinar registrations
contacts.description: Total number of Zoom webinars this contact has registered for.

companies.name: ai_solution_portfolio
companies.label: AI solution portfolio
companies.description: Tracks the AI solutions offered by the company to align sales and marketing efforts.

companies.name: industry_focus
companies.label: Industry focus
companies.description: Identifies the industries the company specializes in to align offerings with market needs.

companies.name: partnering_isvs
companies.label: Partnering ISVs
companies.description: Tracks the ISVs partnering with the company to streamline collaboration and resource allocation.

companies.name: salesforce_certifications
companies.label: Salesforce certifications
companies.description: Tracks Salesforce certifications held by the company for showcasing expertise to clients.

deals.name: expected_golive_date
deals.label: Expected go-live date
deals.description: Tracks the expected go-live date for a deal to help manage project timelines effectively.

deals.name: implementation_services
deals.label: Implementation services
deals.description: Tracks whether implementation services are included in a deal, ensuring proper resource allocation.

deals.name: number_of_userslicenses
deals.label: Number of users/licenses
deals.description: Tracks the number of users or licenses associated with a deal, aiding in pricing and planning.

deals.name: subscription_terms
deals.label: Subscription terms
deals.description: Tracks the cadence of subscription for a deal, essential for revenue forecasting.

tickets.name: customer_satisfaction_score
tickets.label: Customer satisfaction score
tickets.description: Tracks customer satisfaction scores for tickets, helping to gauge service quality.

tickets.name: issue_category
tickets.label: Issue category
tickets.description: Categorizes customer support tickets for efficient issue tracking and resolution.

tickets.name: issue_severity
tickets.label: Issue severity
tickets.description: Tracks the severity of a customer support ticket to prioritize resolution efforts.

tickets.name: resolution_sla
tickets.label: Resolution SLA
tickets.description: Tracks the resolution SLA (service-level agreement) in hours to measure support team performance.
